query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION) as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'courses';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2MszHx5kdzDBeHj.root --database dXUckrobvf8MpmEcmPvpzD --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION) as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'courses';
